spans.content: Final-year B.Tech in Computer Engineering (minor: Accounting & Finance). Applied-AI practitioner with a steady, respectful, and
team-minded nature, building end-to-end solutions from data to deployment across vision, NLP, retrieval, and agent systems. Emphasizes
careful experimentation, clear documentation, and useful tooling; currently advancing Generative AI and Reinforcement Learning with
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Engineering
– Designed a K-fold ensemble for lunar crater segmentation on Chandrayaan-2 OHRC tiles (segmentation-models-pytorch, UNet-family
backbones); produced out-of-fold meta-features and trained a meta-learner that outperformed single models
– Boosted rim fidelity with a lightweight adversarial refiner (
stability regularization) and ellipse-projection post-processing to
reduce jagged edges and close broken rims.
– Built a full training/inference stack with Albumentations, AMP/GradScaler, and 4-fold CV; logged IoU/Dice/Accuracy, inference time,
and model size across singles, pairs, triad (avg), and meta-learner.
– Delivered explainability utilities: per-model masks, pairwise blends, ensemble masks, plus “extra vs missed” overlays and heatmaps to
Curated a georeferenced OHRC dataset from ISRO PRADAN; tiled imagery, created binary crater masks, and produced rasterized
outputs for GIS; drafted a live human-in-the-loop loop for annotate
– Real-time YOLOv8 detection (guns/knives) with accuracy of
, trained on a custom Roboflow dataset; hot-swappable best.pt for
– Flask backend with OpenCV MJPEG streaming; SQLite logging (type, confidence, camera, timestamp) and SMS alerts with cool-down.
– Responsive Bootstrap dashboard with live feed, camera selector, detection history; JS controls for start/stop and multi-camera switching.
– Built an end-to-end GPT-style LLM from scratch (PyTorch): byte-level & BPE tokenizers, streaming dataset
gradient accumulation, warmup–cosine LR, checkpointing/resume, TensorBoard logs, and
– Implemented modern Transformer optimizations: RMSNorm, RoPE, SwiGLU MLP, grouped-KV heads (GQA), KV cache with
attention-sink for low-latency streaming generation; included small demos/visualizations to validate attention
– Delivered full alignment pipeline: Supervised fine-tuning utilities (prompt formatting, collators, length curriculum), a
Transformer-based Reward Model for pairwise preferences, and RLHF trainers with PPO and GRPO (policy
– Scaled & ensured correctness: Mixture-of-Experts (top-k routing with load-balancing aux loss), plus
attention math, causal masking, tokenizer/label-shift, LR scheduler, and RL losses; orchestration scripts to run tests, smoke-train, and

attention math, causal masking, tokenizer/label-shift, LR scheduler, and RL losses; orchestration scripts to run tests, smoke-train, and
Deep Learning Pipeline for Knotted Protein Generation and Toxicity Prediction (TopoToxiNet)
– Generate de-novo knotted protein sequences guided by known families and evaluate their biological safety through peptide/protein
– Curated datasets from PDB, UniProt, Pfam for sequence generation; fine-tuned ProtGPT2 for knotted sequence synthesis and integrated
TopoToxiNet—an attention-regularized CNN–BiGRU multi-branch model—for toxicity assessment.
– Tech: Python, PyTorch/Transformers, Pandas, Matplotlib; sequence embeddings, KL regularization, ROC–PR evaluation metrics.
– End-to-end AI pipeline from data curation to generation and safety validation—producing novel knotted protein candidates with
toxicity-aware screening for downstream structural modeling.
Buddy — Personal Voice Assistant for Windows (Python, OpenAI/Ollama, Vosk, PowerShell TTS)
– Wake-word assistant (“buddy”) with one-shot and continuous modes; dual online/offline (OpenAI vs. Ollama
Vosk, ambient-noise calibration, short/long capture; async System.Speech TTS with barge-in and
– Pluggable app launcher via apps.json (paths/args/UWP IDs/.lnk) plus discovery fallbacks (PATH, Start Menu, shell:AppsFolder,
– Natural-language desktop control: open explicit paths (e.g., D:\ISRO), “open folder in drive”, Explorer back/forward/up hotkeys, and
– Ops & memory: timestamped .txt logs of all answers, .env config (wake word, models, mic, dirs, search depth), and admin voice
– Full-stack MERN app; mobile-first React+Vite UI with Context API for predictable global state.
– Real-time cart updates, multi-address deliveries, server-side pagination/filtering for large catalogs.
– Seller Dashboard with inventory CRUD, price/stock controls, order tracking, and basic analytics (MongoDB aggregations).
– RESTful Express APIs on MongoDB with optimized schemas/indexes; deployed FE/BE on Vercel serverless for scalable, low-op
AI/ML/DL: PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, OpenCV (detection, segmentation), Hugging Face, NLP
Data: Pandas, NumPy, SQL, Matplotlib, Tableau, Feature Engineering
